name: Magnificent Hotel Investments Limited
summary: Magnificent Hotel Investments Limited, an investment holding company, invests in and operates hotels in the People's Republic of China and the United Kingdom. It operates through Hospitality Services, Property Investment, and Securities Investment segments. The company also engages in hotel management, property leasing, and securities dealing businesses. The company was formerly known as Magnificent Estates Limited and changed its name to Magnificent Hotel Investments Limited in November 2015. The company was incorporated in 1996 is based in Central, Hong Kong. Magnificent Hotel Investments Limited is a subsidiary of Shun Ho Property Investments Limited.
